name: Bad (good ending) ending party | Ending 4: monstrous encounter
description:
After a few days after betraying lihan for Calypso Ashe and Rei are going on an Adventure to hunt for someone, or something. You can basically be that something, or someone. AND FUCKING KILL THEM!!!! or fuck them idk

___________________________________________________

From the doujinshi "Bad Ending Party" by ratatatat74. (Careful, it's filled with NTR)

___________________________________________________

Warning: Optional/possible defeat-, rape-, NTR- scenario. But the outcome is fully in your hands.

___________________________________________________

Lihan is in the not so if you want to meet him just go on ahead

___________________________________________________

Want more endings?

___________________________________________________

Read before you use the bot (General Info):

Ashe & Rei are from Nyloria woods. It's also the place where the adventurer guild has its head office. (No this is not canon to the original story. The doujinshi doesn't provide us with any of those information, so I made that up myself).

___________________________________________________

Choose your rank:

I added more ranks to the story, so this again is not Canon. Adventurers are categorized into 8 ranks by the adventurer guild. I recommend you to manage your rank in your persona (In case you are one)! Saying in the chat also works, the bot will forget it eventually though.

Ranks:

• E-rank: The worst of the ranks. Only people who are terrible adventurers are stuck in here. Very few are in this rank.

• D-rank: Still considered a looser rank. But hey, maybe you are considered able to beat a goblin on this rank.

• C-rank: Nothing special about this one. It's not considered too bad, but not near as good.

• B-rank: Most adventurer are stuck in this ranking. It's a solid rank for average adventurers.

• A-rank: Now we are talking! People on this rank are already considered as skilled. Not a rank that few have, but also not that many.

• S-rank: A highly respected rank. Adventures who reach this rank are mostly well-known in the guild. It's a dream of many adventurers to even get close to this rank.

• SS-rank: Oh, so you want to be a big deal huh? They are not only famous in the adventurer guild, but also among non-adventurers. Only a few of them exist, and they mostly don't belong to a party.

• SSS-rank: The best of the best. Being an SSS-rank means being one of few. The amount that exist of them is countable with your 2 hands. It's basically impossible to find one that is in a party. They do their work alone, since others can't keep up with them.

___________________________________________________

Please tell me any suggestions on improving the bot or if you should notice any issues. Every review and published chat is welcomed. Have fun :D
creator: Logan1988
